🩹 P3-5 follow-ups — three red checks on main, fixed forward

#2908 auto-merged with 3 failing (non-required) checks. Same governance gap as platform #8219 — noted. Each failure was real:

1. test-hook-structure.sh — event whitelist 
the shell layer had a hardcoded VALID_EVENTS list (the two-layer lesson, third strike)
+ UserPromptExpansion PostToolBatch  (MessageDisplay deliberately NOT added — see 2)
2. claude plugin validate — hooks.MessageDisplay: Invalid key in record 
CC's plugin schema accepts UserPromptExpansion + PostToolBatch but NOT MessageDisplay.
The validator is authoritative → observer REVERTED whole (hook, entries, tests, counts
219→218, async 107→106, events 30→29). Closure gate keeps everything exact.
Re-add when the plugin schema accepts the key — cc-watch will surface it.
3. Eval changed skills — audit-activation quality 0% 
The NEW gate worked: it ran the real grader. 0% was structural, not content:
skills with disable-model-invocation: true cannot be ROUTED to by the model,
and the default quality tier relies on routing → 0% by construction.
Fix: run-skill-eval.sh auto-selects the harness's designed TIER-1 unit eval
(--force-skill injects SKILL.md) for direct-only skills. Detection verified;
this PR touches the skill so CI re-exercises the eval end-to-end.

Gates

claude plugin validate → Validation passed · validate-registry PASS(0) · tsc.test OK
hook-structure PASS · validate-counts ✓ 218 · touched suites green · builds OK
